creator: stb@lassitu.de
text:
Update port to Gitea 1.9.0.

Gitea 1.9.0 fixes five security issues and a large number of bugs, and introduces a number of new features.

Release announcement: https://blog.gitea.io/2019/07/gitea-1.9.0-is-released/
Release notes: https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea/releases/tag/v1.9.0
